## Summary

<!-- Brief description of what this PR changes and why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Dependency update
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] I opened (or linked) an issue discussing this change before opening the PR.
- [ ] My change passes the CI checks (CodeQL, pip-audit, gitleaks).
- [ ] I have **not** committed any secrets or API keys.
- [ ] If I changed a dependency, I updated **both** `pyproject.toml` and `requirements.txt`.
- [ ] I tested the affected path locally (web UI or CLI).

## Notes for reviewer

<!-- Anything the reviewer should pay attention to. -->
